mise plugin install node
mise plugin install node ... done
mise plugin install python
mise plugin install python ... done
mise plugin install ruby
mise plugin install ruby ... done
mise install node@22.5.0
mise downloading node 22.5.0
mise extracting node 22.5.0
mise installing node 22.5.0
mise node@22.5.0 installed
mise install python@3.13.1
mise downloading python 3.13.1
mise extracting python 3.13.1
mise installing python 3.13.1
mise python@3.13.1 installed
mise install ruby@3.4.2
mise downloading ruby 3.4.2
mise extracting ruby 3.4.2
mise installing ruby 3.4.2
mise ruby@3.4.2 installed
mise use node@22.5.0
mise use python@3.13.1
mise use ruby@3.4.2
mise node@22.5.0 is now active
mise python@3.13.1 is now active
mise ruby@3.4.2 is now active
mise activated for /home/user/project
mise all tools installed and activated
mise settings updated in /home/user/project/.mise.toml
verbose: checking for updates
verbose: no updates available
error: mise install failed for erlang@27.0 -- build error
